hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); case "$f" in */dashboard/*) cd "$ROOT/dashboard" && npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" ;; */backend/*|*/ble_service.py) ruff format --config "$ROOT/ruff.toml" "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
